changelog: v3.2.8 - Hosting Email Hesaplari Yonetim Modali (5 op)
Hesaplar tab: yeni hesap olustur (username + domain + sifre + kota + sinirsiz toggle)
Yonlendirmeler tab: yeni yonlendirme + liste + sil
ESC + outside click ile kapatma, badge'li tab counter
Operations: hosting_add_new_email, hosting_update_email, hosting_delete_email, hosting_add_new_email_forward, hosting_delete_email_forward
